Name: the Aurigan Directorate
Description: The Aurigan Directorate replaced the Aurigan Coalition when Santiago Espinosa, adviser to the High Lady Kamea Arano, betrayed her and led a coup against her government. In the years since that coup, Director Espinosa has solidified his hold on the systems of the Directorate, binding the Founding Families to his cause with a mixture of promises and threats. His rule is oppressive and militaristic, with individual liberties sacrificed to the cause of security and stability.
ReputationStatements: Desperate times call for desperate measures. We wouldn't be asking to hire you unless we had no other choice. Hopefully the fee will sway you.
Weak leadership nearly destroyed this realm. We will not repeat that mistake.
Times are changing, Commander. There is a need in the Directorate for one of your skills. Contracts like this one will pave a way for your future, through us. That future need not be dark.
A rising tide lifts all ships, Commander. House Espinosa is rising quite quickly. Continue to work for us, and we'll ensure you continue to be a prominent figure in the Reach.
This assignment is important. The people deserve order, prosperity, and safety. I intend to provide all three.
Our influence spreads, as do our garrisons. Your help has been invaluable in this, Commander.
History is written by those willing to make difficult decisions. House Espinosa honors you, Commander.
MissionSuccessStatements: Excellent work, Commander. I was right to put my faith in you. The Directorate salutes your bravery.
GoodFaithFailureStatements: A commander may lose a battle. He must never lose his nerve.
BadFaithFailureStatements: I find your conduct deeply disappointing. The realm depends upon those willing to stand firm. Today, you were not among them.
